title: Logical error: '(isConst() || isSparse() || isReplicated()) ? getDataType() == rhs.getDataType() : typeid(*this) == typeid(rhs)' (STID: 2508-35cc)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT UNSIGNED, name VARCHAR(5), value DOUBLE, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) SELECT number, LEFT(UUID(), 5), RAND() FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS number FROM (SELECT @rownum := 0) r, (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10) t1, (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10) t2 LIMIT 100) AS numbers;
SELECT * FROM test_table ORDER BY name, CHAR_LENGTH(name);
key_bug_features: Ordering by column size in SELECT statement
